title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.480 - What damages recovered for waste
text:
537.480.  What damages recovered for waste. — Any person who is entitled to such civil action shall recover such damages as it shall appear that he has suffered by the waste complained of.
(RSMo 1939 § 3009) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2622; 1919 § 6916; 1909 § 7919
